Report.title: Civic Report
Report.description: A report of a civic issue submitted by a citizen.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the citizen who submitted the report.

photoUrl.description: The URL of the photo of the civic issue stored in Firebase Storage.

gps.description: The GPS location coordinates of the civic issue.

landmark.description: Nearby landmark name select or typed.

category.description: The category of the civic issue (e.g., Pothole, Water Leak, Broken Streetlight, Waste Problem).

status.description: The status of the report. Defaults to 'Reported'.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the report was submitted.

upvote_count.description: Number of upvotes for this report.

downvote_count.description: Number of downvotes for this report.

upvotedBy.description: List of user UIDs who upvoted.

downvotedBy.description: List of user UIDs who downvoted.

resolvedGps.description: GPS coordinates of the resolution photo captured live on-site.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the resolution was completed on-site.

aiDescription.description: Optional AI-generated description from image analysis.

citizenDescription.description: Optional user-entered details describing the issue.

ApprovedStaff.title: Approved Staff
ApprovedStaff.description: Pre-approved phone number or email authorized for municipal or government roles.

contact.description: Pre-approved phone number or email of the staff member.

role.description: The administrative role assigned to this contact.

GroupDrive.title: Group Drive
GroupDrive.description: A community cleanup or fix drive created by citizens.

landmarkName.description: The name of the area or landmark where the drive will take place.

date.description: The date of the community drive.

creatorId.description: UID of the citizen who created this drive.

minParticipants.description: The minimum number of participants required (typically 10).

beforePhotoUrl.description: Before-photo proof captured live via camera.

afterPhotoUrl.description: After-photo proof captured live via camera.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the drive was completed.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing gamification details like citizen streaks.

lastActiveDate.description: Last active date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

Config.title: Configuration
Config.description: Dynamic configuration properties like Super Admin email address.

superAdminEmail.description: The email address of the Super Admin authorized to approve staff roles.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Collection of civic issue reports submitted by citizens.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles tracking citizen streaks and gamification badges.
